---
title: "Felix Gabay"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/felix-gabay/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/gabay147
---

Felix Gabay is a data analyst from Lawrence, Kansas. A recent graduate of the University of Kansas, Felix earned his Bachelor's of Science in Behavioral Neuroscience with a data science certificate in May 2026.

At home, Felix enjoys experimenting with a variety of artistic media and being cat dad to Phylla and Noni.

## Education

**University of Kansas** \| Lawrence, KS\
B.S in Behavioral Neuroscience, Data Science Certificate \| Aug 2024 - May 2026

**Johnson County Community College** \| Overland Park, KS \
AAS in Game Art and Design \| Aug 2018 - May 2021

## Experience

Peruvian Connection \| Data Analytics Intern \| June 2025 - Dec 2025
